string.description: Text value for hostnames, usernames, paths, and configuration keywords

integer.description: Whole number for port numbers, connection timeouts, alive intervals

boolean.description: Boolean value using yes/no convention for enabling or disabling features

pattern.description: Glob pattern with wildcards used in Host and Match directives for hostname matching

path.description: File system path, typically for identity files, known hosts, and config includes

address.description: Network address optionally with port for proxy and forwarding configurations
